description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring long, narrow, lance-shaped green leaves with lighter edges, arranged in a dense, upright cluster. The leaves appear healthy and vibrant, with a glossy surface and a slightly arching form. The plant is housed in a simple, round pot that is partially visible and appears to be made of a reddish-brown material, possibly terracotta or clay, with some weathering or soil residue on the rim. There are no visible decorative patterns or embellishments on the pot, and the plant's foliage almost completely obscures the container from most angles. The overall size and style suggest it is suitable for placement on a tabletop or small stand, likely in an indoor or sheltered outdoor urban environment. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or plant.
description: A compact potted plant with long, glossy green leaves in a plain, round reddish-brown pot, suitable for indoor or sheltered outdoor placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing upright, dense green leaves with the rim of the reddish-brown pot partially visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, arching leaves extending horizontally and the full circular rim of the pot.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with overlapping leaves obscuring most of the pot, emphasizing the plant's dense foliage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length and layering of the leaves, with the pot's rim visible and some soil residue apparent.
